message:
fix(messaging): add fabric_checkpoint with cancel tracing for all entry points (8w83i.24)

Replace bare cx.checkpoint() in all fabric async entry points with
fabric_checkpoint(cx, operation) which emits a structured
fabric.cancelled trace event when cancellation is detected. This gives
operators visibility into cancel pressure on the packet plane.

Audited entry points: connect, reserve_publish, reserve_publish_durable,
publish, subscribe, request (added missing explicit checkpoint),
request_certified, stream, FabricSubscription::next.

108 fabric tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
